summary: Iteration 30 - All backend (12/12) and frontend tests passed. Verified: Netgear name abbreviation, MAC enrichment on managed devices, add-to-monitoring endpoint (with 409 for duplicates), device-detail endpoint, endpoint panel with 'Apri Pagina Web' and 'Aggiungi al Monitoraggio' buttons, PING/SNMP selector, and MAC address display on nodes.

backend_netgear_name_abbreviation: Netgear names are properly abbreviated (e.g., 'NETGEAR GS110EMX - Armadio rete' instead of long description)
backend_mac_enrichment: Managed devices with known MAC have 'mac' field populated in topology nodes
Found multiple nodes with MAC addresses (e.g., 00:EE:FF:00:11:22)
backend_device_detail_endpoint: Returns port_speeds array (10G ports on Netgear .3)
backend_add_to_monitoring: POST /api/network/add-to-monitoring returns 409 for duplicate IP (192.168.1.50 already monitored)
POST /api/network/add-to-monitoring returns 400 for missing required fields
POST /api/network/add-to-monitoring successfully adds new endpoint (192.168.1.10 or .51)
backend_discovered_endpoints: Discovered endpoints have required fields (hostname, IP, MAC, switch_port)
frontend_endpoint_panel: 'Apri Pagina Web' button visible on endpoint panel
'Aggiungi al Monitoraggio' button visible on endpoint panel
Endpoint info section shows Hostname, IP, MAC Address, Porta Switch
frontend_managed_device_panel: 'Apri Pagina Web' button visible for managed devices (switches)
Device info shows abbreviated name (NETGEAR GS110EMX - Armadio rete)
PORTE HIGH-SPEED section shows Port 9 10G, Port 10 10G
ENDPOINT CONNESSI section shows connected endpoints
CONNESSIONI MAC section shows MAC connections
frontend_mac_display: MAC addresses visible on nodes in network map (24 MACs found)
MAC addresses displayed in device detail panels

critical_code_review_comments: _clean_device_name() function correctly abbreviates long Netgear names by extracting brand+model and location
MAC enrichment from network_discovery.device_macs works correctly for managed devices
add-to-monitoring endpoint properly checks for duplicates and returns 409
DeviceDetailPanel.js correctly shows 'Apri Pagina Web' for all devices with valid IP
DeviceDetailPanel.js correctly shows 'Aggiungi al Monitoraggio' only for discovered_endpoints
PING/SNMP type selector correctly appears for endpoints being added
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data. Note: PC-RECEPTION (192.168.1.50) and SRV-DC01 (192.168.1.10) were added to monitoring during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 verified all new features: 1) Netgear names are abbreviated (e.g., 'NETGEAR GS110EMX - Armadio rete'), 2) Managed devices show MAC addresses from device_macs enrichment, 3) add-to-monitoring endpoint works with 409 for duplicates, 4) Endpoint panel shows 'Apri Pagina Web' and 'Aggiungi al Monitoraggio' buttons with PING/SNMP selector, 5) Endpoint info shows Hostname/IP/MAC/Porta Switch. Note: 192.168.1.50 and 192.168.1.10 are now monitored devices.

netgear_name_abbreviation.before: NETGEAR GS110EMX - 8-Port Gigabit Ethernet Smart Managed Plus Switch with 2-Port 10G/Multi-Gig Uplinks - Under Counter 5m

mac_enrichment.description: Managed devices with known MAC have 'mac' field in topology

endpoint_panel_buttons.apri_pagina_web: Visible for all devices with valid IP
